title: Update strategy of dots and lines
author: thetwom
body: Hi, I stumbled over your "DotsAndLines"-implementation and I am wondering about your opinion of having copies of the DotsAndLinesState at each update step. To me it seems like the underlying dot-list is copied quite often and I wonder, if such a strategy is can be viewed as good practice and without real performance issues for compose apps.

title: Video player reload when goes in pip
author: nipunkraj
body: Video player is reloading the video if goes in pip, or orientation changes
